IDTierPlanMax HostsAmountPaymentDateStatus
#{{ p['id'] }} {{ tiers[p['tier']]['label'] }} {{ plans[p['plan']]['label'] }} {{ 'Unlimited' if p['max_hosts'] == 0 else p['max_hosts'] }} ${{ "%.2f"|format(p['amount']) }} {{ p['payment_method'] or '—' }}{% if p['payment_ref'] %} ({{ p['payment_ref'] }}){% endif %} {{ p['purchased_at'][:10] }} {{ p['status'] }}
